title: userregistrationendpoint
description: Test user registration endpoint for successful user creation with valid data and proper error handling for invalid inputs.

title: userprofilemanagementendpoint
description: Verify user profile management endpoint allows updating and retrieving user profile information correctly.

title: projectcreationendpoint
description: Test project creation endpoint to ensure projects can be created with valid data and proper validation errors are returned for invalid data.

title: projectcrudoperationsendpoint
description: Verify CRUD operations on projects including retrieval, update, and deletion work as expected with correct status codes.

title: kanbanboardfunctionalityendpoint
description: Test Kanban board related endpoints to ensure tasks can be moved across different statuses and the board reflects changes accurately.

title: taskcreationendpoint
description: Verify task creation endpoint allows creating tasks with valid data and returns appropriate errors for invalid inputs.

title: taskcrudoperationsendpoint
description: Test CRUD operations for tasks including updating task details, status tracking, and deletion with correct responses.

title: teamcreationendpoint
description: Verify team creation endpoint allows creating teams with valid data and handles errors for invalid inputs.

title: teammembermanagementendpoint
description: Test team member management endpoints to ensure members can be added, removed, and listed correctly within a team.
